system.notes:
Weary Regulator, City Law

She inspects buildings and reports to the Duskwall Council whether they are sound, and whether they serve the purpose listed on the owner's taxation form. She is front-line in the tug-of-war between criminals, politicians, and nobles. She no longer cares about the greater good. Now it's about kickbacks.

She takes the path of least resistance in her evaluations, so people pay to make their preference easier and other roads harder. She hires outsiders for off-the-books communication with pushy customers.
